purpose: Codify the development workflow after Stage 6Z: one operator-owned Pull request lifecycle, larger related-stage batches, and a reusable batch planning template before further feature work.

stages.title: Development workflow contract
stages.outcome: Repository records the required order: branch, commit, push, Pull request, checks, merge to main, local main verification, then Lovable sync prompt.

stages.title: Batch size guard
stages.outcome: Future development defaults to at least three related stages per Pull request unless a documented hotfix reason is present.

stages.title: Batch planning template
stages.outcome: A reusable template exists for planning future multi-stage PRs, expected checks, Lovable prompt timing, and sync recovery.

batchPolicy.defaultInstruction: Increase code and documentation volume per batch by grouping related stages into one Pull request.
